hero.title: Exquisite dining since 1989
hero.description: Experience our seasonal menu in beautiful country surroundings. Eat the freshest produce from the comfort of our farmhouse.

presentation.title: Enjoyable place for all the family
presentation.description: Our fantastic surroundings make dining with us a great experience for everyone. We can even arrange a tour of the garden before your meal.

presentation.title: The most locally sourced food
presentation.description: All our ingredients come directly from our farm or local fishery. So you can be sure that you're eating the freshest, most sustainable food.

highlights.title: A few highlights from our menu
highlights.description: We cater for all dietary requirements, but here's a glimpse at some of our diner's favourites. Our menu is revamped every season.

items.title: Seared Salmon Fillet
items.description: Our locally sourced salmon served with a refreshing buckwheat summer salad.

items.title: Rosemary Filet Mignon
items.description: Our prime beef served to your taste with a delicious choice of seasonal sides.

items.title: Summer Fruit Chocolate Mousse
items.description: Creamy mousse combined with summer fruits and dark chocolate shavings.

options.title: Family Gathering
options.description: We love catering for entire families. So please bring everyone along for a special meal with your loved ones. We'll provide a memorable experience for all.

options.title: Special Events
options.description: Whether it's a romantic dinner or special date you're celebrating with others we'll look after you. We'll be sure to mark your special date with an unforgettable meal.

options.title: Social Events
options.description: Are you looking to have a larger social event? No problem! We're quite more than happy to cater for big parties. We'll work with you to make your event a hit with everyone.
